top.title: Iranian ambassador warns UK to be 'very careful' about further involvement in war

top.title: Armed robots take to the battlefield in Ukraine war
top.summary: Ukraine has embarked on a programme to deploy armed robots on the battlefield against Russian forces.

top.title: We've been speaking to Iranians during one week of war. Here's what they said

top.title: TfL hack in 2024 affected around 10 million people, BBC can reveal
top.summary: TfL insists it has "kept customers informed throughout this incident and will continue to take all necessary action".

top.title: Anthropic vows to sue Pentagon over supply chain risk label
top.summary: The supply chain risk designation of the artificial intelligence firm is a first for a US company.
